name: mcp-integration-decision
description: Decision: Replace agent.chat internals with AI SDK. Current agent.chat uses @anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk query(). Will replace with AI SDK streamText() using claudeCode() provider. MCP interface unchanged - frontend continues using mcpService.streamChat().
recommendation: Modify agent.chat.ts to import ai-sdk-provider-claude-code and use streamText() instead of query(). Map streaming events to context.streamContent() for SSE compatibility.
